texto: Guys like Henry and his buddies were an accident waiting to happen
autor: the little kids' version of floods or tornadoes or gallstones.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a the little kids' version of floods or tornadoes or gallstones.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Guys like Henry and his buddies were an accident waiting to happen” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, stephen-king, it pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de it.
